verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In this time of desperation When all we know is doubt and fear There is only one foundation We believe, we believe

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In this broken generation When all is dark, You help us see There is only one salvation We believe, we believe

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We believe in God the Father We believe in Jesus Christ We believe in the Holy Spirit And He's given us new life

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We believe in the crucifixion We believe that He conquered death We believe in the resurrection And He's comin' back again, we believe

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So, let our faith be more than anthems Greater than the songs we sing And in our weakness and temptations We believe, we believe!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We believe in God the Father! We believe in Jesus Christ! We believe in the Holy Spirit! And He's given us new life!

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: We believe in the crucifixion! We believe that He conquered death! We believe in the resurrection! And He's comin' back again!

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Let the lost be found and the dead be raised! In the here and now, let love invade! Let the church live loud, our God we'll say We believe, we believe!

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: And the gates of hell will not prevail! For the power of God, has torn the veil! Now we know Your love will never fail! We believe, we believe!

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: We believe in God the Father We believe in Jesus Christ We believe in the Holy Spirit And He's given us new life!

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: We believe in the crucifixion! We believe that He conquered death! We believe in the resurrection! And He's comin' back,

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: He's comin' back again! He's comin' back again! We believe! We believe
